name: Tobacco Smoke
definition: Tobacco smoke exposure from active smoking or secondhand smoke. Contains thousands of chemicals including nicotine, tar, and carcinogens. Sources include cigarettes, cigars, electronic nicotine delivery systems, and environmental tobacco smoke.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Inflammation, oxidative stress, impaired mucociliary clearance, emphysema, COPD, lung cancer
Endothelial dysfunction, thrombosis, atherosclerosis, CAD, stroke

sensitive_windows.mechanism_rationale: Smoking initiation; addiction establishment; lung development
